seo.title: Rev Abs Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Go way beyond crunches to work your abs with Rev Abs. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: One of the most sought-after experts for fitness and motivation, Brett has created revolutionary programs, books and DVDs to push people to achieve their best. He’s a passionate speaker who travels to schools around the world to combat bullying and sharing his tips for overcoming adversity.

data.descriptionShort: With RevABS workouts, now you can upgrade your six-pack to an eight-pack.
data.descriptionLong: Go way beyond crunches to work your abs in ways you never dreamed possible. This RevABS workout will shred your core like nothing else. Get ready for the most advanced ab exercises you’ve ever done.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells or Resistance Bands, Core Comfort Mat*

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Larry R. lost 5.5 pounds doing Rev Abs!
modules.testimonial: It works your core, works your glutes, works your arms, and it works your calves. So, it's a full-body workout. It gives you a little cardio as well.
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort.
